programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is in the magic town of Maní to learn about something sacred to the Mayans - bees and honey. A group of women who protect the endangered Melipona, a stingless bee native to Yucatán, invites her to join in a Mayan energy cleansing ritual.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Tekit The Capital of the Guayabera Pati encounters a tale of sons going against their father's wishes to follow their own path. Pati meets a farmer's son who went against his father to build a family business making the iconic Guayabera shirts.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the streets of Yucatán's capital, Mérida. She tries the best tacos in Mérida at Wayan'e. The aroma of freshly made cookies lures her to Dondé Fabric, where their globitos and bizcochitos are an important part of Mérida's mornings.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Chef Wilson Alonzo in his hometown of Halachó to prepare a traditional Cochinita Pibil in an underground pit. Pati helps Wilson prepare the achiote marinade, along with his grandmother who taught him traditional cooking.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati arrives in Motul, a town in the history books for Yucatán's once thriving henequén industry and for the egg dish Huevos Motuleños. Pati meets Doña Evelia, who put Motul back on the map with her world-famous recipe.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Temozón is the birthplace of Yucatán's signature smoked meat Carne Ahumada and everyone in town claims to have a relative who invented it. Pati strolls around town to try different versions of Carne Ahumada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati returns to Mérida to meet sisters, Delia and Maria Elide, who love to cook and laugh and are famous for recados - pastes of spices and aromatic herbs that season Yucatecan foods. In Uxmal, she learns about ingredients that make recados unique.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: No trip to Yucatán is complete without seeing a beautiful cenote, natural freshwater pools in caves. To learn more about Mayan communities, Pati visits Cenote Xocempich with lawyer Zoila Cen, who has dedicated her career to helping Mayan people.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: An ingredient Pati constantly uses is salt and Yucatán has one of the most unique salts. The Las Coloradas salt, which means blush red, gets its distinctive color from red algae. Felipe Perez takes Pati to the pink lakes where the salt is produced.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Yaxunah, Pati discovers Yucatán's league of their own. She joins the Amazonas, a softball team of indigenous women, for their morning practice. As they built a name for themselves, they overcame the mindset that women belong in the kitchen.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat grills riverside with renowned chef Vivek Surti, crafting lamb mamna and chicken kebabs inspired by his Indian heritage.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Houston to go Gulf Bay fishing with chef Chris Shepherd, hoping to catch some redfish and gather a side of blue crabs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat travels to the Emerald Coast of Destin, Florida, to join his friend Adam Evans on a spearfishing adventure, sourcing fresh fish to cook over live fire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Edgar Victoria, known for bringing the street foods of Mexico City to Nashville, to do some live fire cooking out in nature as they prepare one of his favorite dishes - skirt steak tlayuda.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin heads to the Cherokee National Forest for a day of fly fishing with an old friend, and to cook up their fresh catch over the campfire.

programme.desc: Pati explores the streets of Yucatán's capital, Mérida. She tries the best tacos in Mérida at Wayan'e. The aroma of freshly made cookies lures her to Dondé Fabric, where their globitos and bizcochitos are an important part of Mérida's mornings.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Chef Wilson Alonzo in his hometown of Halachó to prepare a traditional Cochinita Pibil in an underground pit. Pati helps Wilson prepare the achiote marinade, along with his grandmother who taught him traditional cooking.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati arrives in Motul, a town in the history books for Yucatán's once thriving henequén industry and for the egg dish Huevos Motuleños. Pati meets Doña Evelia, who put Motul back on the map with her world-famous recipe.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Temozón is the birthplace of Yucatán's signature smoked meat Carne Ahumada and everyone in town claims to have a relative who invented it. Pati strolls around town to try different versions of Carne Ahumada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati returns to Mérida to meet sisters, Delia and Maria Elide, who love to cook and laugh and are famous for recados - pastes of spices and aromatic herbs that season Yucatecan foods. In Uxmal, she learns about ingredients that make recados unique.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: No trip to Yucatán is complete without seeing a beautiful cenote, natural freshwater pools in caves. To learn more about Mayan communities, Pati visits Cenote Xocempich with lawyer Zoila Cen, who has dedicated her career to helping Mayan people.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: An ingredient Pati constantly uses is salt and Yucatán has one of the most unique salts. The Las Coloradas salt, which means blush red, gets its distinctive color from red algae. Felipe Perez takes Pati to the pink lakes where the salt is produced.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Yaxunah, Pati discovers Yucatán's league of their own. She joins the Amazonas, a softball team of indigenous women, for their morning practice. As they built a name for themselves, they overcame the mindset that women belong in the kitchen.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.desc: Frankie visits Nashville for smoky BBQ Pork, hand-pulled noodles, a luxe burger, and hand-pulled noodles.

programme.title: Worth the Hype

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Dr. Temperance Brennan, a forensic anthropologist who works at the Jeffersonian Institution and also writes books, has an impressive ability to read clues from victims' bones. Consequently, law enforcement calls her to assist with investigations when remains are so badly decomposed, burned or destroyed that standard identification methods are useless. Brennan is teamed with Special Agent Seeley Bo

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Junk dealer Fred Sanford runs roughshod over his son and partner, Lamont, in a groundbreaking sitcom. Fred's moneymaking schemes routinely backfire, and he does just about anything to get out of working -- up to and including faking a heart attack. He's rude, sarcastic, outspoken, overtly prejudiced, and pretty darn nasty to his friends and family.

programme.title: Destinos cruzados
programme.desc: Toprak despierta de un coma tras cinco años sin recordar nada de su pasado, y regresa a una familia que no reconoce, incluida su prometida de toda la vida y un niño que vive con él. Sin embargo, su amnesia lo mantiene en una incertidumbre constante.

programme.title: La reina del flow
programme.desc: Yeimy Montoya paga una injusta condena en Nueva York tras haber sido engañada por el hombre que amaba. Por lo tanto, hace un pacto con las autoridades judiciales para capturar al hombre que asesinó a su familia.

programme.title: Pantanal
programme.desc: José Leôncio, hacendado del Pantanal, deja a una joven embarazada en una visita a Río de Janeiro. Ella va a vivir con él al Pantanal, pero es infeliz y decide volver a la ciudad con su hijo. Veinte años después, este va en busca de su padre.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: A rancher (Van Heflin) needing cash is hired to put an outlaw (Glenn Ford) on the train to Yuma prison.

programme.title: Cowboy
programme.desc: A Chicago hotel desk clerk (Jack Lemmon) talks a trail boss (Glenn Ford) into taking him on a cattle drive to Mexico.

programme.title: A Big Hand for the Little Lady
programme.desc: Married homesteaders (Henry Fonda, Joanne Woodward) stop at a Texas hotel, where he loses big at poker and she takes his place.

programme.title: Rachel and the Stranger
programme.desc: A frontier widower (William Holden) treats his bride (Loretta Young) like a servant, until a passing stranger (Robert Mitchum) pays her attention.

programme.title: The Lion
programme.desc: An American lawyer's (William Holden) ex-wife (Capucine) summons him to Kenya to see their daughter's savage link to a lion.

programme.title: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: Prospectors (Clark Gable, Jack Oakie) and an abandoned woman (Loretta Young) mush the Yukon with a dog sled led by Buck.

programme.title: The Black Swan
programme.desc: As governor of Jamaica, buccaneer Henry Morgan (Laird Cregar) sends a swashbuckler (Tyrone Power) to capture renegade pirates.

programme.title: The Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: A newsman (Tyrone Power) woos an Irish innkeeper (Anne Baxter) and wrestles a leprechaun (Cecil Kellaway), who follows him back to New York.

programme.title: Goodbye Charlie
programme.desc: Shot by an angry husband, a playboy writer comes back as a blonde (Debbie Reynolds), as his buddy (Tony Curtis) finds out.

programme.title: His Girl Friday
programme.desc: An ace reporter's editor, her ex-husband, tries everything possible to stop her from remarrying someone else.

programme.title: The Trouble With Angels
programme.desc: A headstrong girl (Hayley Mills) and her best friend (June Harding) bedevil the mother superior (Rosalind Russell) of a convent school.

programme.title: Where Angels Go, Trouble Follows
programme.desc: A mother superior (Rosalind Russell) and a rebel nun (Stella Stevens) lead a cross-country bus trip to an interfaith youth rally.

programme.title: Gidget
programme.desc: A California girl called Gidget (Sandra Dee) spends summer with surf bums called Moondoggie (James Darren) and Kahoona (Cliff Robertson).

programme.title: A Summer Place
programme.desc: A man (Richard Egan) and a woman's (Dorothy McGuire) Maine-coast adultery parallels his teenage daughter's (Sandra Dee) romance with her son.

programme.title: The Poseidon Adventure
programme.desc: A clergyman (Gene Hackman) leads survivors of a capsized luxury liner through the ship's innards to its highest point.

programme.title: The French Connection
programme.desc: New York Detective Popeye Doyle (Gene Hackman) and his partner (Roy Scheider) chase a French heroin smuggler.

programme.title: The Last American Hero
programme.desc: A North Carolina moonshiner becomes a professional stock-car racer to raise money to free his jailed father.

programme.title: Zorba the Greek
programme.desc: A lusty Greek peasant (Anthony Quinn) shows a British writer (Alan Bates) how to live and run a lignite mine.

programme.title: Impact
programme.desc: A declared-dead man (Brian Donlevy) hides out with a widow (Ella Raines) after his wife and her lover botch his murder.

programme.title: Night Train to Paris
programme.desc: A retired spy helps his former boss recover tapes containing defense information, only to learn his new partner has double-crossed him.

programme.title: The Verdict
programme.desc: A former Scotland Yard superintendent attempts to commit the perfect murder in the hopes of discrediting his successor.

programme.title: Berlin Express
programme.desc: International train passengers (Merle Oberon, Robert Ryan, Charles Korvin) comb postwar Frankfurt for a politician abducted by Nazis.

programme.title: Cry Terror
programme.desc: An electronics expert (James Mason), his wife (Inger Stevens), daughter and an airline are held hostage in New York by a mad bomber (Rod Steiger).

programme.title: Crossroads
programme.desc: A rattled French diplomat (William Powell) and his wife (Hedy Lamarr) become victims of a blackmailer's (Basil Rathbone) ruse about his past.

programme.title: Possessed
programme.desc: An oilman's (Raymond Massey) bride (Joan Crawford) sees her ex-boyfriend (Van Heflin) romance her stepdaughter, and it drives her mad.

programme.title: Crime Wave
programme.desc: Former jailmates make it difficult for a paroled man (Gene Nelson), hounded by a suspicious detective (Sterling Hayden), to go straight.

programme.title: Riff-Raff
programme.desc: A trouble-shooter (Pat O'Brien) woos a singer and foils a crook (Walter Slezak) while searching Panama for an oil map.

programme.title: 23 Paces to Baker Street
programme.desc: A blind London playwright (Van Johnson) overhears a kidnap plot and thwarts it with his girlfriend (Vera Miles).

programme.title: The Hustler
programme.desc: A gambler (George C. Scott) stakes pool shark Fast Eddie Felson (Paul Newman) in a smoke-filled marathon against Minnesota Fats (Jackie Gleason).

programme.title: Fresh Sheet
programme.desc: History hangs in the balance as Ovechkin closes in on the 900th goal of his career. Meanwhile, the Caps' Tom Wilson and Logan Thompson push through a pivotal stretch, chasing Olympic dreams with Team Canada in sight. Milestones and legacy collide.

programme.title: Caps Red Line
programme.desc: The Capitals welcome two teams from the Professional Women's Hockey League to take over their home ice, Alexa Landestoy interviews local PWHL star and USA Olympian Hayley Scamurra, and Alex Ovechkin and Pierre-Luc Dubois exchange jerseys with the Montréal Victoire.

programme.title: Beyond the Buzzer
programme.desc: Wizards fans celebrate John Wall's impact with a night to remember at Capital One Arena, Alex Sarr and Tre Johnson make a young fan's dream come true with an unforgettable gameday experience, Wes Hall takes viewers behind the scenes of Basketball Day in the DMV, and NBA pioneer Earl Lloyd's son reflects on his father's lasting legacy.

programme.title: Politics Aside with Chris Cillizza
programme.desc: Veteran journalist Chris Cillizza engages top political figures in conversations about their sports backgrounds, highlighting teamwork and sportsmanship to help bridge divides on Capitol Hill.

programme.title: Hometown With Rachel Nichols
programme.desc: Hometown is on the road as Rachel heads to Minnesota to meet up with retired Caps great and fan favorite, T.J. Oshie, to get a glimpse of life after retirement. He opens up about his devastating injury and his new career as a hockey analyst.

programme.title: Wizards Pregame Live
programme.desc: Host Wes Hall and multiple analysts get viewers ready for the upcoming game, with news updates and analysis.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: From Capital One Arena in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Wizards Postgame Live
programme.desc: Washington Wizards postgame news, analysis and commentary, as well as highlights, statistics and interviews with players and coaches.
